applicabilityConditions: Azure AI infrastructure requires material sequential investment
Scaled capital investment would increase COGS
FY24 operating-expense growth expected to remain low
Capacity buildout timing varies by quarter
recommendedAction: Scale capital investment for AI infrastructure while capping operating-expense growth to preserve profitability margin
nonApplicabilityConditions: Investment needs span infrastructure and multiple operating teams
exceptions: Disciplined cost management across every team
External supply supplements owned capacity when lead time requires it
reversalSignals: Broad cloud demand without a specific platform shift
Investment needs spanning multiple operating teams
